name: Hearty Potato Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large kettle, cook potatoes, carrots and celery in water until tender, about 20 minutes.
2. Drain the vegetables and reserve the liquid separately.
3. In the same kettle, sauté onion in butter until soft.
4. Stir in flour, salt, and pepper; gradually add milk, stirring constantly until thickened.
5. Gently stir in the cooked vegetables.
6. Add 1 cup or more of the reserved cooking liquid to reach the desired consistency.
